name: Fat Free Ratatouille
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Zucchini (2 to 3 inches by about 10 inches) - about 3/4 lb.
1 medium Green Pepper (about 4 inches in diameter)
1 medium Red Pepper (about 4 inches in diameter)
1 can V8 Juice (5 oz.) or other vegetable juice
2 tablespoons Each of fresh chopped Oregano, Basil, and Thyme
(If using dry spices, use 1/2 teaspoon each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the eggplant and dice into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Split and quarter the zucchini and yellow crookneck squash, then dice into 1/2-inch pieces.
3. Remove tough stems and seeds from both peppers and dice into 1/2-inch pieces.
4. In a large pot, add water, tomato paste, and V8 Juice; mix well.
5. Add garlic and spices; mix again.
6. Heat the pot on medium/high until just ready to boil. Reduce heat to simmer and cover.
7. Stir periodically to prevent burning. Cook for at least 1 hour, or a long simmer enhances flavor.
8. Serve over pasta, rice, potatoes, wheat berries, lettuce, or alone. Keeps well in the refrigerator.
Nutritional Value (per pot using Netzer book):
Calories = 368
Protein = 15.9 g
Carbs = 74.6 g
Fat = 2 g
Fiber = 17 g
Magnesium = 0
Sodium = 125 mg
% Fat-Free Calories = 5%
Optional TVP® Style:
1 cup TVP (large chunk size)
1/2 cup boiling water
1/4 cup tamari
1/4 cup Mirin
Mix TVP, tamari, and mirin in a bowl. Pour boiling water over it and mix. Let stand about 15 to 20 minutes, mixing several times. Drain and add to the ratatouille pot about 30 minutes into the simmer.
Nutritional Value (with TVP):
Calories = 605
Protein = 75.9 g
Carbs = 74.6 g
Fat = 2.7 g
Fiber = 33.5 g
Magnesium = 0
Sodium = 170 mg
% Fat-Free Calories = 4%
Note: Marinade absorption not included in above values; Sodium will be higher than shown.
